official_sources.authority_note: Official binary source for set_time body encoding.
Official binary source for the Play clientbound packet table and set_time packet id.

field_notes.scope: Primitive gameTime plus empty clock update map fixture only.

stop_boundary: Proves Play clientbound set_time packet framing and dispatch/decode for one empty clock update map fixture only; does not infer WorldClock, ClockNetworkState, or time runtime behavior.
